{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/8376642?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/gnzsnz/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/gnzsnz/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/gnzsnz/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/gnzsnz/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/gnzsnz", "id": 8376642, "login": "gnzsnz", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjgzNzY2NDI=", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/gnzsnz/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/gnzsnz/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/gnzsnz/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/gnzsnz/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/gnzsnz/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/gnzsnz", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": null, "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 6.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:H/AT:P/PR:N/UI:N/VC:L/VI:L/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-327", "name": "Use of a Broken or Risky Cryptographic Algorithm"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-1188", "name": "Initialization of a Resource with an Insecure Default"}], "description": "## Summary

The built-in SSH server currently advertises a number of key exchange, MAC, and host key algorithms that are considered weak or broken. The defaults should be tightened so a fresh installation passes a baseline SSH security audit out of the box.

## Details

Running `ssh-audit` against a default deployment flags the following as `fail`:

- **Key exchange**
  - `ecdh-sha2-nistp256`
  - `ecdh-sha2-nistp384`
  - `ecdh-sha2-nistp521`
- **MAC**
  - `hmac-sha1`
- **Host key**
  - `ssh-rsa`

## Reproduction

```sh
docker run -it --rm positronsecurity/ssh-audit -p 2222 gitea.local
```

## Impact

Default deployments expose algorithms that are known-weak or deprecated upstream. The current workaround requires manually setting several `GITEA__server__SSH_SERVER_*` variables, which most users will never do.

### Workaround

```ini
[server]
SSH_SERVER_KEY_EXCHANGES = curve25519-sha256, diffie-hellman-group14-sha256
SSH_SERVER_CIPHERS       = chacha20-poly1305@openssh.com, aes128-ctr, aes192-ctr, aes256-ctr, aes128-gcm@openssh.com, aes256-gcm@openssh.com
SSH_SERVER_MACS          = hmac-sha2-256-etm@openssh.com, hmac-sha2-256
```

There is no exposed option to restrict host key algorithms, so `ssh-rsa` remains advertised.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Default `SSH_SERVER_KEY_EXCHANGES`, `SSH_SERVER_CIPHERS`, and `SSH_SERVER_MACS` updated to the secure list above.
- [ ] New `SSH_SERVER_HOST_KEY_ALGORITHMS` option added, with a default that excludes `ssh-rsa`.
- [ ] Documentation updated to reflect the new defaults.
- [ ] `ssh-audit` against a fresh install reports no `[fail]` entries.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-3m6q-h5gj-7mrw", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-22T20:37:21Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-3m6q-h5gj-7mrw", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-3m6q-h5gj-7mrw"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-04-22T20:37:21Z", "references": ["https://github.com/go-gitea/gitea/security/advisories/GHSA-3m6q-h5gj-7mrw", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-3m6q-h5gj-7mrw"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/go-gitea/gitea/security-advisories/GHSA-3m6q-h5gj-7mrw", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/go-gitea/gitea", "summary": "Gitea has insecure default SSH settings", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-04-22T20:37:22Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-3m6q-h5gj-7mrw", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.25.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "code.gitea.io/gitea"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 1.25.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: Gitea has insecure default SSH settings
